signals.raw:
Lakers Down 3-1 to Timberwolves in West 1st Round; No Cavs Series Matchup | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Los Angeles Lakers trail the Minnesota Timberwolves 3-1 in their ongoing Western Conference first-round playoff series as of Game 4, with Minnesota winning 116-113 at home; LeBron James scored 27 points and grabbed 12 rebounds, but the Lakers' offense faltered in the fourth quarter.[4]
